'''Teeku''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] member of the [[Tetsu Clan]]. Along with [[Teeko]], he was one of the uncles of [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] active during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].

{{Char-stub}}
